hero.title: Beast of Reincarnation Wiki
hero.description: Master Emma and Koo's hybrid combat, explore post-apocalyptic Japan, defeat Nushi, unlock skills, and prepare for every boss and story secret.

gameFeature.title: Beast of Reincarnation Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Control Emma in real-time sword combat, command Koo through tactical techniques, parry to earn skill points, and hunt the giant Nushi across a post-apocalyptic Japan reshaped by blight.

tools.subtitle: Everything you need to master Emma and Koo's journey through blighted Japan

releaseDateAndPlatforms.title: Beast of Reincarnation Release Date and Platforms
releaseDateAndPlatforms.subtitle: Beast of Reincarnation launches in August 2026 for PS5, Xbox Series X|S and Windows PC, with Xbox Game Pass, Play Anywhere, cloud and handheld support.
releaseDateAndPlatforms.intro: Game Freak's one-person, one-dog action RPG has a worldwide console release date of August 4, 2026. The Steam storefront may display August 3 because its release date is adjusted for regional store timing.

items.label: Worldwide Release
items.details: The PlayStation and Xbox stores list Beast of Reincarnation for August 4, 2026.

items.label: Steam Release
items.details: The Steam storefront displays August 3 in some regions because PC unlock dates use regional store timing.

items.label: PlayStation
items.details: Beast of Reincarnation includes offline single-player support, PS Remote Play, DualSense vibration and trigger effects, and PS5 Pro enhancements.

items.label: Xbox and PC
items.details: The Xbox version supports Smart Delivery, 4K Ultra HD, Xbox achievements and Xbox cloud saves.

items.label: Game Pass and Play Anywhere
items.details: Beast of Reincarnation is included with Game Pass at launch. Xbox Play Anywhere lets one digital purchase work on supported Xbox consoles and Windows PC.

items.label: Cloud and Handheld Play
items.details: The Xbox version supports cloud play through eligible Game Pass plans and is optimized for supported Windows handheld devices.

items.label: Supported Text Languages
items.details: Beast of Reincarnation supports English, French, German, Spanish from Spain, Japanese, Korean, Brazilian Portuguese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Italian and Latin American Spanish.

items.label: Full Voice Audio
items.details: Beast of Reincarnation ships with complete English and Japanese voice audio, plus interface and subtitle support for the other listed languages.

editionsAndPreOrder.title: Beast of Reincarnation Editions and Pre-Order Bonuses
editionsAndPreOrder.subtitle: Compare the two digital editions of Beast of Reincarnation, their US prices and every included bonus. Both editions are available to pre-order before launch.
editionsAndPreOrder.intro: The Standard Edition contains the complete Beast of Reincarnation game for $59.99, while the $69.99 Digital Deluxe Edition adds cosmetic equipment, a special sword, Amber and vegetable seedlings. Pre-orders also receive a separate Koo skin and currency bonus.

items.standard: Brown Shiba Skin for Koo and 30,000 Amber
items.digitalDeluxe: Brown Shiba Skin for Koo and 30,000 Amber, in addition to the Deluxe content

beginnerGuide.title: Beast of Reincarnation Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the basic exploration, progression and combat loop followed by Emma and Koo. These starting steps focus on parrying, companion commands and building a practical loadout.
beginnerGuide.intro: Players control Emma during real-time exploration and sword combat while issuing commands to Koo through a tactical menu. Progress comes from crossing blighted regions, defeating malefacts and Nushi, collecting their power and developing both characters through equipment and skill trees.

items.title: Choose a Comfortable Difficulty
items.description: Select a lower difficulty while learning Beast of Reincarnation's action systems, enemy attack timing and Koo's command mechanics.
items.tip: Koo's support abilities and the skill trees provide additional ways to reduce the pressure of difficult encounters.

items.title: Explore the Changing Environment
items.description: Blight can transform plains and wastelands into dense forests while you explore, opening encounters with new malefacts.
items.tip: Watch for routes across collapsed bridges, walls and elevated terrain instead of following only the main path.

items.title: Use Emma's Plant Abilities
items.description: Emma can manipulate her plant-like hair to cross environmental obstacles and approach enemies from different positions.
items.tip: When positioned above an enemy, Emma can extend her hair to perform a falling assassination.

items.title: Practice Parries Early
items.description: A successful parry blocks an incoming attack at the correct moment and generates points for Koo's techniques in Beast of Reincarnation.
items.tip: Study one enemy at a time and focus on its attack animation before attempting repeated parries.

items.title: Build Around Your Preferred Style
items.description: Use skill trees, gear and Spirit Stones to develop aggressive melee, ranged or stealth-focused loadouts for Emma and Koo.
items.tip: Start with equipment that supports the actions you use most instead of spreading upgrades across every playstyle.

items.title: Defeat Malefacts and Nushi
items.description: Fight through blighted forests, defeat the powerful Nushi controlling each region and absorb their powers in Beast of Reincarnation.
items.tip: Nushi encounters are major progression battles, so prepare Emma's equipment and Koo's available techniques before entering.

combatAndParryGuide.title: Beast of Reincarnation Combat and Parry Guide
combatAndParryGuide.subtitle: Combat combines Emma's real-time sword actions with Koo's command-based techniques. Successful parries connect the two systems by generating the points required to activate Koo's abilities.
combatAndParryGuide.intro: The central combat loop in Beast of Reincarnation is built around reading attacks, parrying with Emma and converting the earned points into Koo techniques. Opening Koo's command menu slows the action, allowing players to assess the battlefield before selecting their next move.

items.result: Identify the wind-up, direction and impact timing of the incoming strike.
items.playerFocus: Avoid attacking continuously when an enemy has started a clear attack animation.

items.result: A correctly timed parry protects Emma and generates points used by Koo.
items.playerFocus: Press the defensive input close to the moment the attack reaches Emma.

items.result: Combat slows while the available companion techniques are displayed.
items.playerFocus: On PS5, Koo's command menu is opened with the Triangle button.

items.result: Spend the points generated through parries to activate the chosen companion ability.
items.playerFocus: Match the technique to the current enemy, positioning and battlefield pressure.

items.result: Return to sword combat and take advantage of the opening created by Koo.
items.playerFocus: Use the companion technique as part of a combined sequence rather than as an isolated attack.

items.result: Switch between attacks, parries and commands as enemy behavior changes.
items.playerFocus: Develop Emma and Koo through skill trees, gear and Spirit Stones to support ranged, stealthy or aggressive tactics.

buildsAndGearGuide.title: Beast of Reincarnation Builds and Gear Guide
buildsAndGearGuide.subtitle: Combine skill trees, Spirit Stones, katanas and Koo's Charms to shape how Emma and Koo fight. Supported approaches include aggressive sword combat, ranged pressure and stealth.
buildsAndGearGuide.intro: Emma and Koo share one combat system in Beast of Reincarnation but use different tools. Emma performs real-time katana actions and parries, while Koo's command skills provide tactical support. Equipment discovered through exploration adds specialized bonuses that can be combined with both characters' skill trees.

items.name: Aggressive Katana Build
items.howItWorks: Stay close to enemies, parry incoming attacks and convert the earned command points into Koo's abilities. New katanas found while exploring provide specialized bonuses for different loadouts.

items.name: Tactical Command Build
items.playstyle: Measured combat with regular command-menu use
items.howItWorks: Use Emma's parries to generate points, then open Koo's command menu to slow combat and select an ability suited to the current situation. Charms found through exploration add specialized bonuses to Koo's side of the loadout.

items.name: Ranged Control Build
items.howItWorks: Pressure enemies from range while using Koo's abilities to control dangerous situations. This approach supports players who prefer positioning and tactical choices over constant close-range exchanges.

items.name: Stealth and Ambush Build
items.howItWorks: Use Emma's vine-like hair to cross broken terrain, reach elevated positions and extend above an enemy to perform a falling assassination before direct combat begins.

items.name: Spirit Stone Loadout
items.howItWorks: Spirit Stones grant different effects in response to actions performed during battle. Pair their effects with Emma's weapon, Koo's Charms and the skills unlocked for both characters.

items.name: Big Dipper
items.howItWorks: Big Dipper is a named sword for Emma included with the Digital Deluxe Edition of Beast of Reincarnation alongside Koo skins, Oni's Hat, Amber and vegetable seedlings.

nushiAndBossesGuide.title: Beast of Reincarnation Nushi and Bosses Guide
nushiAndBossesGuide.subtitle: Nushi are giant malefacts that generate blighted forests across the world. Emma and Koo must defeat them and acquire their power before confronting the source of the blight.
nushiAndBossesGuide.intro: Major encounters in Beast of Reincarnation are built around the partnership between Emma and Koo. Emma handles real-time sword combat and parries, while Koo supplies command-based techniques selected while combat slows down.

items.name: Nushi
items.location: At the heart of a blighted forest created by the Nushi
items.encounterFlow: Travel through the transformed forest, fight the malefacts living inside it and reach the giant creature controlling the area.
items.combatFocus: Use Emma's katana actions and parries to create opportunities for Koo's command skills.
items.reward: Emma and Koo absorb the Nushi's immense power and acquire new skills needed for the journey.

items.name: Blighted Forest Guardians
items.location: Dense forests that suddenly emerge from plains and wastelands
items.encounterFlow: Fight through hostile creatures and changing terrain before reaching the area's main Nushi.
items.combatFocus: Choose between direct aggression, ranged pressure and stealth-based openings according to the terrain.
items.reward: Progress toward the Nushi encounter and access to exploration routes containing equipment.

items.name: Nushi Power Acquisition
items.encounterFlow: The victory becomes part of Emma and Koo's long-term preparation for the final target.
items.combatFocus: Newly acquired abilities expand the tactical relationship between Emma's real-time actions and Koo's command techniques.
items.reward: Additional powers and skills for Emma and Koo.

items.name: The Beast of Reincarnation
items.location: The final destination of Emma and Koo's westward journey
items.encounterFlow: Defeat Nushi across the world, capture their powers and continue toward the source of the corruption consuming Japan.
items.combatFocus: The journey prepares both characters for a final confrontation requiring their combined abilities.
items.reward: The opportunity to end the age of corruption and stop the spread of blight.

charactersAndStory.title: Beast of Reincarnation Characters and Story
charactersAndStory.subtitle: The story of Beast of Reincarnation follows two beings who should never coexist: a Sealer born with blight and a malefact hunted as a threat. Their bond becomes central to both the narrative and combat.
charactersAndStory.intro: In Japan in the year 4026, Emma and Koo meet in the eastern lands and begin a journey toward the far West. Along the way, they hunt Nushi, absorb their power and uncover the secrets carried by the people around them.

items.name: Emma
items.identity: A young outcast born corrupted by blight and fused with plants
items.abilities: Emma manipulates her plant-like hair for traversal, attacks and falling assassinations. In combat, she uses fast katana actions and parries to generate points for Koo's skills.
items.story: Emma has no memories or emotions and is feared by the people around her. As a Sealer, she hunts malefacts and absorbs their blight into her own body.

items.name: Koo
items.identity: A malefact, one of the beings considered a serious threat to the world
items.abilities: Koo unleashes techniques through a command menu that slows combat while the player chooses an action.
items.story: Koo's existence conflicts with Emma's duty as a Sealer, but their meeting begins a partnership that grows stronger throughout the journey.

items.name: The Beast of Reincarnation
items.identity: The source of the blight spreading across the world
items.abilities: Its corruption is connected to the transformed landscapes, malefacts and blighted forests covering Japan.
items.story: Emma and Koo travel toward the far West and gather the powers of defeated Nushi so they can confront it.

items.name: Nushi
items.identity: Giant malefacts capable of generating blighted forests
items.abilities: Their influence can abruptly transform open land into dense, hostile forest.
items.story: Defeating Nushi allows Emma and Koo to absorb their immense power and acquire skills required for the final journey.

items.name: Colony Residents and Allies
items.identity: People living in the few habitable areas remaining in the devastated world
items.abilities: They provide human connections and support as Emma and Koo cross the ruined country.
items.story: The people Emma and Koo meet carry major secrets that become intertwined with the central story of Beast of Reincarnation.

worldAndExplorationGuide.title: Beast of Reincarnation World and Exploration Guide
worldAndExplorationGuide.subtitle: Traditional Japanese imagery, ruined technology and living forests form a world that can transform during exploration. Emma's plant abilities open routes across damaged and overgrown terrain.
worldAndExplorationGuide.intro: The journey in Beast of Reincarnation begins in a Colony and continues through plains, wastelands, ruins and blighted forests. The environment is not a static backdrop: the influence of blight can reshape entire areas and introduce new threats while Emma and Koo are travelling.

items.name: The Colony
items.description: The story of Beast of Reincarnation begins inside a Colony, one of the few areas where people can still live in the devastated world.
explorationFeatures: Introduction to Emma's isolation and role as a Sealer
items.dangersAndRewards: The Colony establishes the contrast between the remaining human settlements and the corrupted lands outside.

items.name: Plains and Wastelands
items.description: Wide plains and wastelands can gradually or suddenly transform into dense forests under the influence of blight.
items.dangersAndRewards: A seemingly open route can become overgrown and produce previously unseen malefacts.

items.name: Blighted Forests
items.description: These forests are generated by giant malefacts known as Nushi and can erupt from the wasteland in a short period of time.
items.dangersAndRewards: Fight through the forest to reach its Nushi, whose power and skills can be absorbed after victory.

items.name: Ruined Urban Areas
items.description: Remnants of Japanese cities appear beneath vegetation and decaying infrastructure, blending traditional cultural elements with science-fiction ruins.
items.dangersAndRewards: Damaged architecture creates traversal obstacles and elevated positions that Emma can reach with her plant-like hair.

items.name: Plant-Hair Traversal
items.description: Emma can manipulate her vine-like hair to move across terrain that normal travellers cannot cross.
items.dangersAndRewards: Using vertical routes can provide safer approaches to enemies and access to alternate paths.

items.name: Exploration Equipment
items.description: Exploration is one of the main ways to expand Emma and Koo's combat options in Beast of Reincarnation.
items.dangersAndRewards: Discovered weapons and Charms provide specialized bonuses that can be combined with Spirit Stones and skill-tree choices.

items.name: The Changing Environment
items.description: Blight changes the environment in real time as plains and wastelands become forests and new threats emerge.
items.dangersAndRewards: The terrain itself becomes part of the challenge, changing routes and combat conditions during the journey.

items.name: The Sky
items.description: An ancient rule warns travellers never to look up at the sky because something is said to be floating above the world.
explorationFeatures: A recurring mystery connected to the world's secrets
items.dangersAndRewards: The warning forms part of the larger mystery surrounding the ruined world and its history.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Beast of Reincarnation

questions.question: What is Beast of Reincarnation?
questions.answer: Beast of Reincarnation is a one-person, one-dog action RPG developed by Game Freak and published by Fictions. Players control Emma in real-time sword combat and issue tactical commands to her canine companion Koo.

questions.question: When does Beast of Reincarnation release?
questions.answer: Beast of Reincarnation has a worldwide release date of August 4, 2026 on PS5, Xbox Series X|S and Windows PC. The Steam storefront may display August 3 in some regions due to regional store timing.

questions.question: What platforms is Beast of Reincarnation on?
questions.answer: Beast of Reincarnation launches on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S and Windows PC, and it is available on Xbox Game Pass Ultimate on day one with Xbox Play Anywhere support.

questions.question: How does combat work in Beast of Reincarnation?
questions.answer: Beast of Reincarnation combines Emma's real-time katana actions with Koo's command techniques. Successful parries generate points that unlock Koo's abilities, and opening the command menu slows combat so you can choose your next move.

questions.question: What are Nushi in Beast of Reincarnation?
questions.answer: Nushi are giant malefacts in Beast of Reincarnation that generate blighted forests across the world. Defeating a Nushi lets Emma and Koo absorb its power and unlock new skills for the journey ahead.

questions.question: What editions does Beast of Reincarnation have?
questions.answer: Beast of Reincarnation offers a $59.99 Standard Edition and a $69.99 Digital Deluxe Edition that adds the Big Dipper sword, Oni's Hat, 100,000 Amber, Koo skins and seedlings. Pre-orders also receive a Brown Shiba Skin for Koo and 30,000 Amber.

cta.title: Ready to Begin the Journey?
cta.description: Join the Beast of Reincarnation community on Discord and pre-order on Steam, PlayStation Store, or Xbox for Emma and Koo's one-person, one-dog adventure.
